documentationFeedback: Documentation is clear and well-structured. The cross-role operations table in github-apps.md explains the permission model concisely. The review workflow has inline comments explaining the rationale.
observations: The curl -sf in the review workflow will silently fail if the daemon endpoint errors — consider adding error handling or logging
Endpoint tests cover all error paths but lack a happy-path integration test that verifies successful setDraftStatus invocation through the endpoint
Cannot test the endpoint against the live daemon since it runs main branch code — unit tests are the primary verification
